creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
Not that long ago I was asked to attach build reports. However :)

Per the very recent discussion at https://bitbucket.org/maproom/qmapshack/pull-requests/105/add-freebsd-support/diff I discovered that owners of supported GPS devices could use their device with qmapshack if they had sysutils/bsdisks installed (my device is too old, so I cannot test) - perhaps that dependency should be added?
